title: Beta Hotfix Patch Notes - v0.99.1
author: demileaf
contents:
Got a quick hotfix for our players on the beta branch--this is what it's all for, so thank you to everyone providing feedback! If you're interested in accessing the beta branch, please see the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/games/2868840/announcements/detail/502852451136700759]previous patch notes[/url].

[h3]BUG FIXES:[/h3]

- Fixed a softlock that could occur when a player dies to [b]Breakthrough[/b] card's self-HP loss in multiplayer
- Fixed softlock at the end of the Architect event in multiplayer
